title: Which governance role fits you?
description: Answer a few questions to find out how you can best participate in Cardano governance.

questions.question: How much time can you dedicate to Cardano governance?
options: A few minutes to set it up, then I'm done
I can check in regularly and stay informed
I want to actively participate and vote on proposals
I'm ready to represent others and make it a regular commitment
questions.explanation: No matter how much time you have, there's a role for you. Even delegating your voting power takes just a few minutes and ensures your ada counts.

questions.question: Do you want to vote on every governance proposal yourself?
options: No, I'd rather have someone knowledgeable vote on my behalf
I'd like to follow along but let someone else decide
Yes, I want to review and vote on proposals myself
Yes, and I want to help others make informed decisions too
questions.explanation: Delegating to a DRep is the easiest way to participate. Your DRep votes on proposals on your behalf, and you can change your DRep anytime.

questions.question: How familiar are you with Cardano's technical parameters and governance processes?
options: I'm new to this and still learning
I understand the basics but not the technical details
I'm comfortable with most governance concepts
I have deep knowledge and can explain them to others
questions.explanation: Cardano governance is designed for all levels. Newcomers can delegate to experienced DReps, while experts can become DReps themselves.

questions.question: What motivates you most about Cardano governance?
options: Making sure my ada has a voice without extra effort
Understanding how decentralized decision-making works
Actively shaping the future direction of Cardano
Representing my community and building trust
questions.explanation: Every motivation is valid. The key is to participate in whatever way works best for you, whether that's delegating, learning, or leading.

questions.question: Would you be comfortable making decisions that affect the entire Cardano network?
options: I'd rather leave that to people who know more
Maybe in the future, once I learn more
Yes, I'm ready to take on that responsibility
Yes, and I want to advocate for specific policy directions
questions.explanation: There's no wrong answer here. Governance works best when people participate at their comfort level. You can always increase your involvement over time.
